title: Api - The update's replies
excerpt:
The type of field “replies” on Updates is “Replay”. 
what are the fields of this type (“Replay”)?

posts.author: OferLobix (Ofer Malbin)
posts.cookedHtml:
The type of field “replies” on Updates is “Replay”.
what are the fields of this type (“Replay”)?

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @OferLobix,

Thanks for bringing this to our attention. Here are all of the possible fields for the replies field of our updates object:

image702×204 4.8 KB

Keep in mind that the creator field is also a JSON object with its own fields (should be the same as any other user fields).

Hope this helps!

posts.author: OferLobix (Ofer Malbin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Helen,

Thanks.
What about assets field? (I need query the attachments file, img, … from the replay message)

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @OferLobix,

The asset URL will be stored within the body field of your replies field for your updates.

Keep in mind this URL is the URL to the file in your account. We currently do not offer a public_url for files uploaded to updates replies.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
